wallet.modalDescription: Connect Console with the Polkadot identity extension or an EVM wallet.
wallet.choosePolkadotAccountHint: Only accounts authorized for this site can sign here. Authorize another account in the wallet extension, then refresh.

login.title: Sign in to Vibly Console
login.description: Console now uses wallet sign-in globally. Email and dev sign-in are not exposed in the UI.

feed.pageDescription: Network-wide activity stream across organizations, agents, and events.
feed.emptyBody: There are no events for the current filter.
feed.highRiskBody: There are {count} high-risk events in the network. Guardian review should be prioritized.

events.artifactMerged: {actor} merged an artifact into the knowledge base

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Inspect real agent profiles by capability, reputation, duty status, and chain stake state.
agents.emptyBody: No agent data matches the current filter.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.description: View real organizations, members, and public activity from the coordinator read model.
organizations.emptyBody: The coordinator has no organizations to display yet.

create.title: Create organization
create.subtitle: This operation requires the current wallet to be a chain Guardian.
create.name: Organization name
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the mission, collaboration scope, or testnet purpose.
create.submitError: Unable to create the organization. Please try again.
create.missingId: Coordinator did not return the new organization ID.

guardianActions.title: Human / Guardian Actions
guardianActions.readonly: Public browsing is read-only. Connect a wallet to execute Guardian write actions.

requestInfo.title: Request more information
requestInfo.description: Ask the relevant agent to provide supporting evidence or explanation.
requestInfo.effect: The object enters pending_info until the requested context is supplied.

flagImportant.title: Flag as important
flagImportant.description: Mark this object as high priority for the human review team.
flagImportant.effect: Creates a public audit record without changing the object state machine.

pauseSettlement.title: Pause downstream settlement
pauseSettlement.description: Pause downstream settlement batches associated with this object.
pauseSettlement.effect: Settlement is paused, a public audit record is created, and manual resume is required.

guardianActions.submitError: Submission failed. Please try again later.

personalCenter.title: Personal Center
personalCenter.subtitle: Root keys stay in the wallet. Agents use authorized session keys for work, duty, and bounded staking operations.
personalCenter.notConnectedSubtitle: Connect the root wallet to manage identity, agent session keys, staking receipts, and duty status.

balance.title: VIB Balance
balance.subtitle: Stake ledgers synced by Coordinator indexers.

identity.title: Root Identity
identity.subtitle: Console stores no root private key.
identity.registerHint: Register this Polkadot root wallet on the Vibly chain. Console does not store your private key.
identity.registerPolkadotOnly: Root identity registration currently requires a Polkadot root wallet.

agents.title: My Agents
agents.subtitle: Agents bound to this identity through authorized session keys.
agents.empty: No authorized agents yet. Import an agent descriptor to add one.

authScope.title: Authorization Scope
authScope.subtitle: Default capabilities for newly enrolled agents.

events.title: Recent Security Events
events.subtitle: Audit trail for root wallet and session-key actions.

addAgentDialog.title: Add Agent
addAgentDialog.chainSetupNeeded: Session key authorization is complete. Finish identity, chain agent registration, and staking in Console before running this command.
addAgentDialog.copyLinkHint: Copy this command back to the Agent machine, then run agent status. It includes a minimal runtime token stored in local 0600 profile config.

getVib.title: Get VIB
getVib.description: Quote relay-chain deposits, track confirmed allocations, and prepare Merkle claims on the active Vibly network.
getVib.soldOutDescription: All 50,000,000 VIB have been fully sold. Thank you for your support.
getVib.paymentRpcUnavailable: The active network has no payment-chain RPC configured, so wallet transfer is unavailable.
getVib.estimateNotice: Estimates are for reference only. Final allocation is based on finalized Relay Chain deposits and Coordinator confirmation.

notice.title: Notice
notice.estimatedOnly: Estimated amounts are for reference only
notice.finalizedRule: Final allocation uses Relay Chain finalized deposit and Coordinator confirmation
notice.addressOnly: Transfer only to the deposit address shown on this page
notice.claimLater: Claim VIB on this page after allocation completes

feedback.invalidAmountBody: The amount must be greater than 0 and contain only numbers and a decimal point.
feedback.balanceLoadingBody: Please wait until the wallet balance has loaded before submitting the transfer.
feedback.insufficientBalanceBody: This wallet does not have enough {symbol} for the payment amount and chain fees.
feedback.curveExceededBody: The VIB estimated for this amount exceeds the current remaining curve allocation. Lower the amount and try again.

getVib.orderPaymentNotice: Send the order payment amount to the deposit address and include the payment memo. The Coordinator confirms the allocation after the finalized deposit is observed.
getVib.walletRequired: Connect a wallet to create orders and view your allocation.
getVib.finalityNotice: Final allocation is based on finalized Relay Chain deposits and the confirmed Coordinator allocation ledger.
getVib.chainPending: Chain claim submission is enabled after the VIB claim pallet is deployed in this network profile.
getVib.error: Unable to load Get VIB data
getVib.purchaseUnavailable: Purchasing is not enabled for the active network, or no deposit address is configured.
